test.name: AIPQA-87 Verify adding a product to cart

kw.name: Login As Standard User And Navigate To Products
Open And Validate Swag Labs Login Page
Open Swag Labs Login Page
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 1000.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\SIVA063\\Arvato Intern\\SwagLABS\\browser\\traces\\temp\\ade8c0e1-5d92-42d0-9928-3f088bca6685"}
Starting Browser process C:\Users\SIVA063\Arvato Intern\SwagLABS\venv\Lib\site-packages\Browser\wrapper\index.js using at 127.0.0.1:63764
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.saucedemo.com/
kw.doc: Open a new Page.
Launch browser, open the Swag Labs login page, and create browser context.

kw.name: Validate Login Page Is Displayed
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=user-name at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=password at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=login-button at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Verify that the Swag Labs login page is loaded and all required login fields are visible.

kw.name: Enter Username
Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'standard_user' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
Populate the username field with the provided username.

kw.name: Validate Username Is Entered
Get Attribute
kw.doc: Returns the HTML ``attribute`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Verify that the username field contains the expected username value.

kw.name: Enter Password
Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'secret_sauce' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
Populate the password field with the provided password.

kw.name: Validate Password Is Entered
Get Attribute
kw.doc: Returns the HTML ``attribute`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Verify that the password field contains the expected password value.

kw.name: Click Login Button
Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
Click the Login button to submit the login form.

kw.name: Validate Products Page Is Displayed
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=.app_logo at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Verify that the inventory page is displayed after a successful login.

kw.name: Add Backpack To Cart And Validate
Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Validate Backpack Button Changed To Remove
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=remove-sauce-labs-backpack at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Validate Cart Badge Count
Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Verify that the cart badge shows the expected count.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=cart_contents_container at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Validate Product Present In Cart
Get Elements
kw.doc: Returns a reference to Playwright [https://playwright.dev/docs/api/class-locator|Locator] for all matched elements by ``selector``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
Verify that the specified product is displayed in the cart.

kw.name: Validate Cart Item Quantity Is 1
Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Verify that the displayed cart quantity is 1.

test.doc: Verify user can add a product and it reflects in cart.

test.name: AIPQA-88 Verify removing product from cart

test.doc: Verify product can be removed from cart successfully.

test.name: AIPQA-112 Verify cart badge updates

Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=remove-sauce-labs-backpack at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Validate Cart Badge Count
Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Verify that the cart badge shows the expected count.

kw.name: Validate Cart Badge Count
Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Verify that the cart badge shows the expected count.

kw.name: Refresh Page
Reload
kw.doc: Reloads current active page.
Reload the current page.

kw.name: Validate Cart Badge Count
Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Verify that the cart badge shows the expected count.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Validate Product Present In Cart
Get Elements
kw.doc: Returns a reference to Playwright [https://playwright.dev/docs/api/class-locator|Locator] for all matched elements by ``selector``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
Verify that the specified product is displayed in the cart.

test.doc: Verify cart items persist after page refresh.
